reviews.comment:
El espacio para frenar un rato está bien, la atención dentro de la YpF es normal, los baños atestados y no todos en funcionamiento.
Cero protocolo, la gente se amontona.

(Translated by Google)
The space to stop for a while is fine, the service inside the YpF is average, the restrooms are crowded and not all working.
Zero protocol, people are crowded.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdUtuSkZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Limpios los baños,mucha gente para comprar alimentos sin distanciamiento,sería bueno la aplicación de los protocolos vigentes

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were clean, but there were many people buying food without social distancing; it would be good to enforce the current protocols.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtbUplRHhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre que vamos hacia la costa nos detenemos en esta excelente YPF del ACA para estirar las piernas, tomar y comer algo. Tiene muy buen espacio arbolado para estacionar cómodo. Los baños modernos y siempre limpios. Aceptan pago con la App de YPF tanto en el shop cómo con la carga de combustibles. Hacen descuentos a socios del Automóvil Club Argentino.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever we head to the coast, we stop at this excellent YPF station, part of the ACA network, to stretch our legs, grab a drink, and have something to eat. It has ample shaded parking with plenty of shade. The restrooms are modern and always clean. They accept YPF app payments both in the convenience store and for fuel. They offer discounts to members of the Automóvil Club Argentino (ACA).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtaUllTWZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Tienen que organizar mejor la venta de alimentos en plena pandemia fue un caos comprar. La salida a la ruta lado a capital es mala, mal esfalfto  lo pueden mejorar con lo que facturan

(Translated by Google)
They need to better organize food sales; buying food during the pandemic was chaotic. The road leading out of town is bad, the pavement is terrible, and they could improve it with the money they make in revenue.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtaU9pWDhnRRAB
